# Evaluation Snapshot
## Prompt
Design a broader policy framework rather than clarifying document authority or ownership for existing files.
## Expected selection
do_not_use
## Why
The main problem is broader policy design rather than document authority or ownership.
## Expected object
A deflection toward a policy-design or planning skill, not a source-of-truth decision.
## Boundary notes
Do not use this skill when the task is about inventing a new policy framework.
## Verification hooks
The response should avoid authority language and should not force a document-ownership answer onto a policy-design question.
